raw.name: Hendson Lin
raw.about: In-house counsel leading contracts for Anthropic's safety research and policy teams, as…

education.school: University of California, Hastings College of the Law

recommendations.name: Matt Heckman
recommendations.text: “Hendson almost singlehandedly kept our commercial legal team afloat during our time together at Quantcast. He's really a manager's dream: great issue spotting ability and substantive legal training, super-solid negotiating and drafting skills, and a highly-collaborative, team-oriented approach that won him fans across the company. While he was an independent contributor, he helped to spearhead multiple cross-functional projects in which he showed the type of leadership and mentorship instincts that will serve him well as a future manager. I hope to have the opportunity to work with Hendson again, but for those that have that chance in the meantime: consider yourselves lucky!”

recommendations.name: John McIntire
recommendations.text:
“Hendson was a central member of my corporate contracts group while I was Chief Legal Officer of SRI.  Just as a baseline, I can certainly state that Hendson proved to be a highly effective, win-win oriented advocate for SRI’s positions on complex contractual issues.  Beyond his mastery of the core job functions, though, I can also state that he was consistently viewed by me and by other members of SRI senior management as thorough, energetic, business- and goal-oriented, and as smart as they come.  Combine those traits with his sense of fun and camaraderie, and you can see why SRI was sad to see him go!
”
